# Day Ahead Market Archive Schemas

## Binding Constraints

Provides binding constraint data for each solution in an operating day. 
Filename: DA-BC-{YEAR}{MONTH}{DAY}{HOUR}{MINUTE}.csv

_Columns_

* IntervalHour-Ending -- The ending of the day-ahead solution in which the constraint was binding
  * Central Time
* GMTIntervalEnd -- Hour ending of the day-ahead solution in which the constraint was binding
  * In GMT instead of Central Time
* Constraint type -- Either a Flowgate (FG), manually added (MA) by an operator, or generated by the market clearing engine (MCE) and verified by a human operator
* NERCID - if there is a NERC identifier attached to this constraint (i.e. this should map back to the NERC Book of Flowgates _IF_ this identifer is present
* State -- "BINDING" or "BREACHED"
* Shadow Price Calculated -- The calculated Shadow Price for the given constraint
* Monitored Element (Line or Transformer -- binding or breached in FROM station TO station format -- i.e. it is not binding or breached in the counterflow direction)
* Contingent Element (Line or Transformer -- if this element is outaged it will cause the Monitored Facility to be binding or breached in the solution. BASE means that no contingent element caused the state)
* Contingency Name Utilized for tracing a value used in the DA market to a value in the adjacent TCR/ARR markets
* Interconnect - Was this in the West (W) or the East (E)?
